rules: DO NOT use generic fonts like Inter, Roboto, or Open Sans for headings.
Headlines MUST use tight letter spacing (tracking-tight).
Arabic text MUST have significantly larger line-height (leading-[2.5]) to accommodate diacritics (harakat).
Use directional utilities (dir='rtl') strictly for Arabic content.

spacing_and_layout.system: Tailwind standard scale, utilizing generous padding (p-6 to p-12) for content breathing room, crucial for reading interfaces.

patterns.mushaf_reading: Centered max-w-4xl container, generous line length, right-aligned Arabic text. Verses distinctly separated, clean background.
patterns.surah_grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6. Bento-style organic cards.
patterns.card_creator: Split layout: 1/2 screen config controls, 1/2 screen live preview canvas.
patterns.ai_assistant: Fixed bottom-right FAB, opening an elegant drawer or side sheet (max-w-md).
patterns.word_breakdown: Inline flex layout wrapping properly (flex-wrap), RTL direction, with absolute/relative positioned translations below each word.

rules: Containers with borders must have internal padding (p-6 or p-8) to prevent text collision.
Image constraints: Mobile height limit max-h-[80vh] md:max-h-none.
Grid items MUST be direct children of grid containers.
Arabic components must properly handle dir='rtl'.

cards.base: bg-white rounded-2xl border border-[#EAE5D9] shadow-sm transition-all duration-300

glassmorphism.toast: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/90 border border-[#EAE5D9] shadow-lg rounded-xl

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: All interactive elements must have clear hover states. Color shifts should be subtle and maintain contrast.
motion_and_interactions.transitions: Use specific properties (transition-colors, transition-transform) with duration-200 to duration-300.
motion_and_interactions.audio_playback: Smooth visual equalizer or pulsing play button state for active word/verse audio.
motion_and_interactions.ai_chat: Staggered fade-in for AI messages. Typing indicator using pulsing dots.
motion_and_interactions.accessibility: Respect prefers-reduced-motion. Don't rely on motion alone to convey state.

components_strategy.surah_card: Minimalist card displaying Surah number in an elegant circular/geometric badge, English name (left), Arabic name (right), with verse count subtitle.
components_strategy.verse_display: Distinct separation between Arabic text (top/RTL), English Translation (bottom/LTR), and Tajweed colors applied to specific spans within Arabic text.
components_strategy.word_by_word: A flex container mapping word objects. Each word block contains Arabic text on top, translation below, clickable to trigger audio. Must break lines responsively.
components_strategy.card_creator_canvas: A relative div matching desired aspect ratio (e.g. 1:1 or 4:5), overlaying the selected background image, with draggable/selectable verse text, scaling typography, and a download button (html-to-image).
components_strategy.ai_fab: Circular prominent button, shadow-lg, fixed bottom-6 right-6, primary color (#2C4C3B) with spark/chat icon.
components_strategy.audio_controls: Sticky bottom bar or inline controls (Play/Pause, Prev, Next, Speed, Reciter dropdown) using Lucide icons.

libraries.ui: shadcn/ui customized with provided colors and border radiuses
libraries.animation: framer-motion for page transitions and drawer slides

verse_card_bg.description: Minimalist abstract background, warm sand colors, subtle gold geometric lines, soft lighting. Use as the default background in the Card Creator.

islamic_pattern.description: Subtle white wall pattern. Use as a low-opacity overlay (bg-repeat, opacity-5) in the hero section or empty states.

architecture_arch.description: Minimalist concrete archway. Can be used in onboarding, auth screens, or About/Hero placeholders.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure all text, especially Tajweed colors, meet WCAG AA contrast against the #F9F6F0 background.
accessibility_and_testing.data_testid: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='play-audio-btn').
accessibility_and_testing.rtl_support: Ensure proper use of <html dir='rtl'> for Arabic segments to ensure natural reading flow and punctuation rendering.

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement layout strictly using Tailwind CSS utility classes and Shadcn components as base.
Do NOT use 'Inter' font for headings; stick to Cormorant Garamond for English headings and Figtree for body text.
Use 'Amiri' or 'Noto Naskh Arabic' for all Arabic text. Increase line-height significantly to prevent cutting off diacritics.
Ensure the Mushaf Reading interface is distraction-free. Keep padding generous.
For Tajweed highlighting, implement a mapping function that wraps specific letters/words in spans with the respective tajweed color classes defined above.
Integrate the 'html-to-image' library for the Card Creator feature.
Do NOT use placeholder text or dummy image URLs. ONLY use the media URLs provided in this JSON.
In the word-by-word breakdown, ensure the flex layout allows wrapping when screen size decreases, keeping the Arabic word above its corresponding translation.
